3104490.name: Black Goblin
3104490.description:
Black Goblin is a first-person immersive atmospheric escape type game. Your task is Collect 'Will' to wake up from a nightmare.
But In nightmare, Unkind enemies called black goblin and his follower will harass you continuously.
So you must keep concentrate on collect 'Will' avoiding them.

■Play time
Average 45-60 minutes.

■Game play
You just control your character to collect 'Will', And Escape from nightmare.
(There are useful item for running away from the enemies.)


※Warning!!
The game contains horror elements(Jump scare..) and players are strongly advised to evaluate their suitability for playing.
3104490.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 韩语, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
